(2024) as prior work, but the comparison is not in-depth.", "R1.7": "There are citations, but no indication of a thorough audit for missing or incorrect ones.", "RX.1": "The text mentions uncertainty regarding potential model evasion strategies, but doesn't explicitly mark confidence levels for claims.", "RX.3": "The text states that AgentSift was evaluated on two datasets, aligning with the requested scope.", "RX.4": "No indication of harmful content or regressions is presented.", "RX.5": "The text mentions updates to stylometric features but doesn't provide details about traceability for non-cosmetic changes."},

rationale.R1.3: The text mentions comparing AgentSift to previous work but doesn't explicitly link specific claims to the evidence presented.
rationale.R1.4: The text names Henderson and Park (2021) and Liu et al. (2024) as prior work, but the comparison is not in-depth.
rationale.R1.7: There are citations, but no indication of a thorough audit for missing or incorrect ones.
rationale.RX.1: The text mentions uncertainty regarding potential model evasion strategies, but doesn't explicitly mark confidence levels for claims.
rationale.RX.3: The text states that AgentSift was evaluated on two datasets, aligning with the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: No indication of harmful content or regressions is presented.
rationale.RX.5: The text mentions updates to stylometric features but doesn't provide details about traceability for non-cosmetic changes.
